headline: Finance and HR Software Stocks Q1 Recap: Benchmarking Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU)
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) and its peers.

headline: Why Did TTD, INTU, LCID Stocks Fall To 52-Week Lows Today?
summary: Trade Desk, Intuit, and Lucid Group fell to fresh 52-week lows on Monday due to a combination of operational concerns, negative sentiment, and ongoing market uncertainty.
